title: codereview: fix NodeMetrics dataclass field for _PACKET_HASH_SET_MAX_SIZE
description: The _PACKET_HASH_SET_MAX_SIZE uses field(default=..., repr=False) which causes 'unexpected keyword' errors during pytest collection across 36 test files (likely due to dataclass init signature changes). Change to ClassVar[int] = 10000. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-pj99
